question: Forecast remaining useful life for transformer T-016 and state whether it can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.
effective_question: Forecast remaining useful life for transformer T-016 and state whether it can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.
answer: The forecasted remaining useful life for transformer T-016 is 57 days. Based on this estimate, it is unlikely that the transformer can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance, as the recommended maintenance is within 30 days due to its degraded health index.
